title: MOBILE DENTAL VAN - 211info
text: MEDICAL TEAMS INTERNATIONAL MOBILE DENTAL VAN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides urgent dental care services through a mobile dental van program. Primary services are extractions and fillings designed to get the patient out of pain. Dental clinics do not provide teeth cleanings, root canals, crowns, dentures, or bridge work. 14150 SW Milton Court Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: -Children and adults in urgent need of dental care who lack dental insurance or a realistic way to pay for treatment -Household income must be no higher than 200% of the federal poverty level and/or the patient must have no private insurance -Some sites may have additional eligibility requirements. Hours: Varies by site Email (503) 624-1000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 624-1000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to view upcoming clinics. Appointments are made through site partners hosting the dental vans. Medical Teams International does not schedule appointments. FEES: No fees DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Emergency Dental Care Mobile Dental Care If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MEDICAL TEAMS INTERNATIONAL
